# ListResourceTemplatesResult.ResultType property

REQUIRED on emit (§3.6, §17.3): the base result-type discriminator, `"complete"` for a list page. Defaults to `"complete"`, which also makes an inbound result that omits `resultType` degrade to `complete` per the §3.6 receiver rule.

```csharp
public string ResultType { get; set; }
```
